allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\("D:\\GitHub Projects\\Bright-and-Shine-Teeth-Brightening\\public\\images\\header logo.png"\); Write-Output "Size: $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)  Format: $\($img.PixelFormat\)"; $corner = $img.GetPixel\(2,2\); Write-Output \("corner A={0} R={1} G={2} B={3}" -f $corner.A,$corner.R,$corner.G,$corner.B\); $center = $img.GetPixel\([int]\($img.Width/2\),[int]\($img.Height/2\)\); Write-Output \("center A={0} R={1} G={2} B={3}" -f $center.A,$center.R,$center.G,$center.B\); $img.Dispose\(\))
